title: Toys for 3 4 5 6 Year Olds Boy, Toy Cars for Boys Toys Age 3-5 Birthday Xmas Gift for 3-5 Year Olds Boys Car Race Track with 46 inch Race Track Toddler Toy Car
features: 【Truck Toys for Boys 3-8】: This car carrier truck toy comes with a truck and 6 die-cast metal racing cars. It features foldable track and storage cabins that can hold 6 colorful race cars, bright colors, and eye-catching outlook designs. Young car enthusiasts will enjoy high-speed fun and love this truck playset toy!

【3-in-1 Transport Truck Toy】: This toddler race truck has a driving function in folded mode. Kids can imagine driving the car truck, pushing, and playing. This truck toy can be transformed into a racetrack in unfold mode, children can use it for competitive games, and enjoy the fun of racing! In addition, the race truck can also be used as a storage space for small cars, storing boys' favorite metal cars.

【Safe & Portable】: The large toy truck is made of environmentally friendly high-quality materials. No fading, non-toxic, no odor. The burr-free surface protects your child from harm. The foldable design is very convenient to carry, so you can race at any time indoor and outdoor. Perfect toy for toddler age 3 4 5 6 7 8 years old.

【Educational Toys】: The transport truck for children is helpful to the development of hand-eye coordination and early preschool education, such as thinking and imagination, creativity, shape recognition, hand-eye coordination and cognitive process. Through hands-on placement of toy cars, children can improve their practical ability and recognize different types of vehicles.

【Ideal Gift for Kids】:The car track truck toy set comes with a beautiful gift box, which is a great gift for children's birthdays, Thanksgiving, Children's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and New Year, and a perfect toy car gift for 3 4 5 6 7 8 years old boys toddler.
